title: In memoriam: Prof. Marie-Teres Albert
content:
The UNESCO World Heritage Centre is deeply saddened by the passing away of Prof. Marie-Teres Albert, former Chairholder of the UNESCO Chair in Heritage Studies at the Brandenburg University of Technology Cottbus-Senftenberg.
Prof. Albert's work was distinguished by a holistic and human-centered understanding of heritage, emphasizing its protection, interpretation, and sustainable use as essential to human development. As Director of the Institute of Heritage Studies at the ...
creator: wh-info@unesco.org (WH-Info)
